quickTaskLog.signature: .planning/memory/quick-tasks.jsonl (JSONL: { id, description, outcome, slug, timestamp, branch })
quickTaskLog.description: Append-only log of quick task executions with outcomes

quickQueryCommand.description: CLI commands to query quick task history

stateAddSetCommand.description: CLI-backed set addition with DAG recalculation and OWNERSHIP.json regeneration

dagRecalculation.description: Recalculate and persist DAG.json after set addition or dependency change

quickLogAppendOnly.description: quick-tasks.jsonl is append-only; existing entries never modified

addSetTransactional.description: state add-set uses withStateTransaction for atomic STATE.json mutation, never direct file writes

dagConsistency.description: After add-set, DAG.json is consistent with STATE.json set list and dependency declarations
